name: National Treasury IFMS
description: Integration with National Treasury Integrated Financial Management System for budget allocations and fund transfers
notes: Critical system for all SOE financial transactions under PFMA

name: SARB Prudential Reporting
description: South African Reserve Bank regulatory reporting for financial SOEs

name: Eskom SAP ERP System
description: SAP S/4HANA ERP integration for operational and financial data from Eskom
notes: Real-time operational metrics for energy sector monitoring

name: DFFE Environmental Compliance Portal
description: Integration with Department of Forestry, Fisheries and Environment for compliance reporting
notes: Required for all energy and industrial SOEs

name: SARS eFiling Integration
description: South African Revenue Service eFiling system for tax compliance
notes: All SOEs must submit monthly and quarterly tax filings

name: JSE Regulatory Reporting
description: Johannesburg Stock Exchange regulatory reporting for listed SOEs and bonds
notes: Required for Eskom, Transnet and ACSA bond programmes

name: CIPC Company Registry
description: Companies and Intellectual Property Commission system for corporate governance filings
notes: Mandatory annual filings for all SOEs under Companies Act

name: AGSA Audit Portal
description: Auditor-General South Africa portal for annual audit submissions
notes: All Schedule 2 and 3 SOEs must submit to AGSA annually

name: NERSA Regulatory Portal
description: National Energy Regulator of South Africa portal for tariff and licence filings
notes: Mandatory for Eskom and licensed IPPs

name: SAP S/4HANA Analytics Hub
description: Centralised analytics platform aggregating data from multiple SOE ERP systems
notes: SAMSOC central analytics hub for cross-SOE analysis

name: Ethics Hotline Platform
description: Third-party ethics and whistleblower management system (Deloitte Tip-offs Anonymous)
notes: Anonymous reporting system for all SOEs

name: SACAA Aviation Compliance Portal
description: South African Civil Aviation Authority portal for aeronautical charges and safety compliance
